abilities.description: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact token you control.

effect.description: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact token you control.
effect.name: CopyPermanent

abilities.target_prompt: Select target artifact token you control to copy

replacements.description: If you would create one or more artifact tokens, instead create those tokens plus an additional Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")
